ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "nces_code" TEXT /* National Center for Education Statistics (NCES) code for the district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the district is located */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total public school enrollment in the district */,
  "last_verified" TEXT /* Date the enrollment data was last verified */,
  "reopening_plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reopening plan associated with the district */,
  "geographic_area" TEXT /* Geographic area of the district (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of schools in the district (e.g., elementary, high school) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_reopening_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("reopening_plan_id") REFERENCES reopening_plans ("reopening_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reopening_plans" (
  "reopening_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reopening plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the reopening plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reopening plan */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of reopening plan (e.g., remote, hybrid, in-person) */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the reopening plan will be implemented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reopening_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_data" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district associated with the enrollment data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for the enrollment figure */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total enrollment for that year */,
  "student_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information about the students (e.g., age, ethnicity) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviation code for the state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "governor_name" TEXT /* Name of the state governor */,
  "education_commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the state education commissioner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., admin, district official) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the district was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, in-app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district associated with the link */,
  "link_url" TEXT /* URL of the reopening plan or resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the link */,
  "link_category" TEXT /* Category of the link (e.g., guidelines, funding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_links_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district associated with the contact */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Full name of the contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "contact_title" TEXT /* Title of the contact person (e.g., superintendent, principal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_contacts_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guideline */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state issuing the guideline */,
  "guideline_text" TEXT /* Text of the issued guideline */,
  "date_issued" TEXT /* Date when the guideline was issued */,
  "guideline_category" TEXT /* Category of the guideline (e.g., health, safety) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_guidelines_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district associated with the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., guidelines, funding) */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link to the resource */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_resources_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district associated with the feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the feedback (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district associated with the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Content of the alert message */,
  "date_alerted" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., urgent, informational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_closures" (
  "closure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school closure */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district associated with the closure */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school that was closed */,
  "closure_date" TEXT /* Date when the school was closed */,
  "closure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the school closure (e.g., COVID-19 outbreak) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("closure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_closures_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district associated with the vaccination data */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccinations were administered */,
  "num_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of individuals vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)
